author: lOrm
content: Re-verified after the 12:24 close: parse_mcp_json_file already honoured both wrapper and bare-map forms for the convention .mcp.json, but load_mcp_servers_from_path (used by manifest McpServersSpec::Path and Array(Path)) was still parsing bare-map only — the drift #919 describes was not fully resolved. Applied the tiny one-liner: load_mcp_servers_from_path now routes through parse_mcp_json_file, so all four file-loading branches (convention + manifest Path + manifest Array Path) accept identical shapes. Inline Map / Array Map branches stay as-is (they're already in-memory data, no parse). cargo build passes.
